name: visionspec
description: Multi-domain specification orchestration using Working Backwards methodology
author: ProductBuildersHQ
context:
# VisionSpec Agent Team

VisionSpec uses the Working Backwards methodology to create comprehensive specifications that flow from market requirements to implementation-ready documents.

## Specification Flow

MRD → Press Release → FAQ → PRD → UXD → TRD → TPD → IRD → spec.md

## Execution Targets

Once reconciled, specs can be exported to: AWS AI-DLC, GitHub SpecKit, GSD, GasTown, GasCity
